case_title: YUKA HARADA VS. GERALD C. LEE, M.D.

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HARADA, YUKA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LEE, M.D., GERALD C. $4,213.00 PRINCIPAL, $105.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,318.00, PLAINTIFF IS ENTITLED TO THE FULL SECURITY DEPOSIT ($3863.00); THE COURT ALSO FINDS THAT DEFENDANT'S USE OF THE SECURITY DEPOSIT TO PAY FOR OUTSTANDING MEDICAL BILLS IS IN BAD FAITH AND AWARDS $300.00 IN ADDITIONAL DAMAGES. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
DEBTOR'S REQUEST FOR SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT LEE, M.D., GERALD C.
REQUEST TO CORRECT OR CANCEL JUDGMENT AND ANSWER . COPY OF "ANSWER" (SC-108) MAILED TO PLAINTIFF. FILED BY DEFENDANT LEE, M.D., GERALD C.
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JUN-01-2010 ORDERED DESTROYED
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM DAVID MCDONALD FILED BY HARADA, YUKA LEE, M.D., GERALD C.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HARADA, YUKA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LEE, M.D., GERALD C. $4,213.00 PRINCIPAL, $105.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,318.00, *****CORRECTED JUDGMENT***** PLAINTIFF IS ENTITLED TO THE FULL SECURITY DEPOSIT ($3863.00); THE COURT ALSO FINDS THAT DEFENDANT'S USE OF THE SECURITY DEPOSIT TO PAY FOR OUTSTANDING MEDICAL BILLS IS IN BAD FAITH AND AWARDS $350.00 IN ADDITIONAL DAMAGES. *****CORRECTED JUDGMENT***** STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY HARADA, YUKA AS TO DEFENDANT LEE, M.D., GERALD C. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-19-2009 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-19-2009 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-29-2009 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID MCDONALD. APPEARANCE BY BOTH PARTIES. EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
ORDER ON REQUEST TO CORRECT OR CANCEL JUDGMENT IS "GRANTED", PER JUDGE PRO TEM DAVID MCDONALD. COPY MAILED TO PARTIES.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED SEP-14-2009, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT LEE, M.D., GERALD C.

ORDER ON REQUEST FOR SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT GRANTED.
